title: Fix terminal sidebar header and unknown status bug

log.context: Fix terminal sidebar header and unknown status bug

All done. Here's a summary of what was fixed in `/mnt/data/terminal/server.py`:

**Bug 1 (line 669 — mangled HTML):** Changed `⭐ GitHub Project#x2B50; Tasks` back to `⭐ Tasks`.

**Bug 2 (status always "unknown"):** Added three helper functions before `_fetch_github_tasks()`:
- `_derive_status(task)` — reads the last `log[]` entry's `event` field and maps it via `_EVENT_TO_STATUS`; falls back to top-level `status` if no `log` array
